title: PHUN Q3 2024 Earnings Release from Investor Relations
text: PHUN Q3 2024 Earnings Release. Key Financial Highlights: Net loss from continuing operations: $2.8 million, or ($0.25) per share for Q3 2024, compared to $13.7 million, or ($5.72) per share for Q3 2023. Cash position: $35.5 million as of September 30, 2024; approximately $110 million as of November 6, 2024 (post-ATM financing). Year-to-date software and subscription bookings increased 300% compared to prior year. Operating cash burn from continuing operations: $10.4 million for Q3 2024 versus $14.6 million for Q3 2023. Leadership Changes: The company announced that Stephen Chen was appointed Interim CEO following Mike Snavely's retirement, and Rahul Mewawalla joined as Board Chairman. CFO Troy Reisner announced his departure effective November 30, 2024. Strategic Development: Phunware signed a term sheet to acquire a controlling interest in MyCanvass, LLC, which is associated with Brad Parscale's Campaign Nucleus SaaS platform.
